valueStreams.name: Discover and shortlist the right property
valueStreams.description: Turn a vague housing need into a ranked shortlist of viable homes that fit price, location, financing, and lifestyle constraints.

stages.name: Define search intent
stages.description: Set location, budget, property type, size, lifestyle, commute, and must-have preferences.

stages.name: Evaluate market fit
stages.description: Compare asking prices to local market conditions and affordability constraints.

stages.name: Shortlist and monitor
stages.description: Save favorites, compare options, and receive alerts when new matches appear.

valueStreams.name: Price and prepare a property for market
valueStreams.description: Determine the right price, timing, and go-to-market approach for selling or renting a property.

stages.name: Understand property value
stages.description: Estimate the likely sale price or rental price based on address, condition, comparables, and local demand.

stages.name: Decide route to market
stages.description: Choose self-serve listing, agent-assisted sale, or landlord workflow depending on urgency and complexity.

stages.name: Prepare listing assets
stages.description: Create the property narrative, photos, attributes, and publishing readiness needed for strong marketplace performance.

valueStreams.name: Acquire and monetize listings
valueStreams.description: Win more seller mandates and turn them into high-performing listings that create closings and commission revenue.

stages.name: Identify opportunities
stages.description: Find likely sellers and attractive properties in target geographies before or as they enter market intent.

stages.name: Convert prospects into mandates
stages.description: Prioritize the best opportunities and assign the right agent to pursue them.

stages.name: List and distribute inventory
stages.description: Publish mandates efficiently and optimize visibility and reach across channels.

valueStreams.name: Deliver accurate broker listings into the marketplace
valueStreams.description: Transform broker-authored listing data into marketplace-compliant inventory with high reliability, low latency, and minimal manual intervention.

stages.name: Map broker listing data to marketplace requirements
stages.description: Align broker-side fields, media, statuses, and business rules with the marketplace's listing model and validation logic.

stages.name: Validate and ingest listing payloads
stages.description: Submit new or updated listings, detect validation failures, and ensure compliant assets and attributes are accepted by the platform.

stages.name: Maintain synchronization over time
stages.description: Keep price, availability, status, media, and metadata continuously in sync as brokers edit listings in their upstream software.

operatingModelNotes: The Real Estate Marketplace enterprise architecture domain covers the business, application, data, and technology structures required to operate property discovery, listing, matching, partner, and transaction workflows.
Business capabilities should be mapped to accountable owners and supported by governed application services.
Cross-domain dependencies should be handled through explicit value streams and service contracts.
